irStages.title: Optimised Reverse

title: Vector + scalar output
description: vpair(x) = (copy(x), sum(x)). The output is a tuple of a vector and a scalar, so its cotangent splits the way every Mooncake tangent does: the vector half is fdata — seeded into a buffer with increment!! — and the scalar half is rdata, passed into the reverse pass as _2.
